payVpnPage.title: VPN payment
payVpnPage.subtitle: Invoice status and amount. In production this step redirects to your payment provider.
payVpnPage.loginRequired: Sign in as the pet owner who created this checkout to view it.
payVpnPage.schemaMissing: The VPN module is not deployed on this server (database migrations required).
payVpnPage.pendingHint: Awaiting payment. After the PSP confirms payment, a webhook updates the status automatically.
payVpnPage.capturedHint: Payment captured. Your subscription should be active — open the VPN section.
payVpnPage.failedHint: Payment failed. Create a new checkout from the VPN page.

owner.aiAssistantDesc: Assesses urgency and suggests next steps.

workspaceUi.sidebarSubtitle: Records, visits and services in one calm workspace.

vpnPage.title: Lapka VPN
vpnPage.subtitle: Subscription status, plans, and devices. Download the WireGuard config only to your own device.
vpnPage.schemaMissing: The VPN module is not deployed on this server (database migration required). Contact your administrator.
vpnPage.emptyProfiles: No profiles yet. Create an app import link below.
vpnPage.fingerprintHint: A browser id is stored locally and ties the link to this device.
vpnPage.checkoutHint: Creates an invoice and opens the payment page. For demos you can keep the default amount; the PSP is auto-picked unless you choose one.
vpnPage.checkoutHintActive: You already have an active subscription — a new checkout is still useful to test renewals or another plan.
vpnPage.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a bit and try again.

petWorkspace.title: Fast switch between pets
petWorkspace.subtitle: One workspace for multiple pets without extra navigation
petWorkspace.emptyDesc: Add your first pet and open the needed sections from one place.

workspaceUi.shiftCardSubtitle: Patients, protocols, lab and digital orders in one flow.
workspaceUi.aiSubtitle: Note structuring, protocol completeness and lab hints.
workspaceUi.redFlagsAlert: Review red flags: respiratory distress, seizures, bleeding, shock, suspected poisoning.
workspaceUi.criticalTasksSubtitle: A short context column only on deep clinical screens.
workspaceUi.shiftTask1: Close current protocols and verify record completeness.
workspaceUi.shiftTask2: Flag urgent signals for patients with emergency complaints.
workspaceUi.shiftTask3: Review lab results and incoming documents.

workspaceUi.opsCardSubtitle: Central branch, operations load, team and quality.
workspaceUi.adminReadOnlyAlert: Medical areas for clinic admin stay read-only and depend on the owner’s active consent.

workspaceUi.sidebarSubtitle: Clinics, roles, AI providers, knowledge, security and system policies in one place.
workspaceUi.railSubtitle: Clinic network, AI, templates, access rules and security in one control plane.
workspaceUi.railAlert: This is the single control plane for the clinic network: roles, AI, templates, security and system policies.

vpnOpsPage.title: VPN — platform operations
vpnOpsPage.subtitle: Billing consistency snapshot (no external PSP calls) and VPN datastore maintenance. Actions are written to the audit log.
vpnOpsPage.schemaMissing: VPN tables are not deployed. Run Alembic migrations.
vpnOpsPage.reconcileHint: Counter snapshot: pending checkouts, active subscriptions, webhooks in the last 24h, captured rows without a matching webhook.
vpnOpsPage.pruneHint: Deletes expired device links, expired/old revoked profiles, old webhook rows, and old terminal checkouts. This cannot be undone.
vpnOpsPage.rateLimitNote: API rate limits apply: reconcile and prune are limited to a few runs per hour per IP.
vpnOpsPage.pruneConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes expired device links, old profiles, and webhook rows per server rules. Continue?

aiPage.headerSubtitle: Providers, default models, failover chains, role scenarios and platform-wide AI usage rules.
aiPage.loadError: Could not load the AI control center.
aiPage.saveError: Could not save AI control center settings.
aiPage.savedNote: Settings saved to the platform control plane.
aiPage.showcaseDescription: The platform coordinates multiple AI providers: who handles owner triage, who assists vets with note structure, and who serves as backup under load.

providerRouting.openai: Owner triage urgency and document explanation.
providerRouting.anthropic: Protocol drafts and vet note structuring.

aiPage.cardRecentSubtitle: Live feed by route, blocks, fallback and latency
aiPage.recentEmpty: The AI activity feed will fill after the first calls from triage, documents, protocols and lab scenarios.
aiPage.cardHealthSubtitle: Load, average latency and troubled routes (14 days)
aiPage.healthEmpty: Scenario metrics will appear after live traffic and show delays, errors and overload.
aiPage.cardClinicLoadSubtitle: Requests, cost, errors and local overrides (30 days)
aiPage.clinicEmpty: No clinic-level load yet. Data appears after the first owner and vet AI routes.
aiPage.cardMatrixSubtitle: What is overridden at platform, clinic and role level
aiPage.matrixEmpty: No overrides yet. Rules for roles, clinics and private scenarios will appear here.
aiPage.loadSplitSubtitle: Scenarios and rules for switching models
aiPage.loadBlock1Text: Safe scenarios only — no treatment or dosing.
aiPage.loadBlock2Text: Protocol structure, visit notes and completeness checks.
aiPage.loadBlock3Text: Lab explanation and context without prescribing therapy.
aiPage.policySubtitle: What the platform administrator controls centrally
aiPage.policyB1: Role separation and AI scenario access by clinic and branch.
aiPage.policyB2: Backup models if the primary provider degrades.
aiPage.policyB3: Shared vocabulary of safety policies, limits and prompt templates.
aiPage.routingSubtitle: Which provider owns each AI scenario by default
aiPage.overridesManageSubtitle: Rules for clinics, branches and roles
aiPage.obsFlows: Owner traffic: up to {{owner}}/h. Vet traffic: up to {{vet}}/h.

dashboardSla.headerSubtitle: Clinics, branches, roles, AI perimeter and network operating signals in one management layer.
dashboardSla.showcaseTitle: The platform manages not one clinic, but a network of branches, teams and AI policies
dashboardSla.showcaseDescription: The platform layer provides real network control: where delays accumulate, where telemedicine rises, which branches hold throughput and how clinics use the AI perimeter.
dashboardSla.disabledBusyHint: Action is in progress, please wait.
dashboardSla.disabledExportInProgressHint: Export is in progress, please wait.
dashboardSla.includeHistoryAria: Include task history in exported CSV files
dashboardSla.myItemsAria: Show only my assigned playbook items
dashboardSla.executionDigestSubtitle: Playbook execution status and SLA discipline.
dashboardSla.trendVsPreviousSubtitle: Comparison vs previous period by completion and overdue.
dashboardSla.exportAnomalySubtitle: Playbook export anomaly detector for compliance risks and unusual activity.
dashboardSla.exportAuditSubtitle: Playbook export compliance journal: who exported CSV, when, and with which filters.
dashboardSla.exportAuditEmptyText: After first exports, an audit trail for compliance appears here.
dashboardSla.networkClinicsSubtitle: Live registry of clinics, teams and branch coverage.
dashboardSla.networkOpsSubtitle: The platform layer must maintain not only roles, but branch resilience.
dashboardSla.networkBullet1: • one branch-aware perimeter: clinic, branch, resource and flow must match across URLs, registries and operational screens;
dashboardSla.networkBullet2: • scheduler and flowboard are a shared operations layer for the network, not a local single-clinic view;
dashboardSla.networkBullet3: • AI routing should be compared across clinics along with template quality and preventive care perimeter;
dashboardSla.networkBullet4: • the platform must track not only revenue, but bottleneck signals, telemedicine and discharge readiness.
dashboardSla.benchmarkSubtitle: Clinics are compared by operational readiness, not only appointment volume.
dashboardSla.branchPressureSubtitle: Where the platform should intervene in schedules, resources or inpatient flow.
dashboardSla.branchSignalsEmptyText: When network branches accumulate traffic, branch-aware load breakdown appears here.
dashboardSla.ownerFunnelSubtitle: End-to-end owner funnel: triage → map → clinic → booking submit.
dashboardSla.sourceConversionSubtitle: Which entry points drive more booking opens and submissions.
dashboardSla.sourcesEmptyText: After owner funnel events, source breakdown appears here.
dashboardSla.weakSourcesSubtitle: A source appears here with at least 3 booking opens and submit-rate below 35%.
dashboardSla.actionPlaybookSubtitle: Automated recommendations with expected uplift and target submit conversion.
dashboardSla.latencyEscalationSkipped: Latency risk is not high, escalation skipped.
dashboardSla.exportEscalationSkipped: Risk is not high, escalation skipped.
dashboardSla.noUrgentActionsText: No urgent SLA actions for system tasks in current window.

usersPage.headerSubtitle: Platform layer for roles, access, plans and module enablement across clinics and networks.
usersPage.showcaseTitle: Platform roles: owner, vet, clinic admin and super user
usersPage.showcaseDescription: This layer manages access rules for the entire platform, not only one demo clinic. It defines roles, module access and organization-level activation.
usersPage.accessModelSubtitle: After owner, vet and clinic admin roles, the next layer is centralized role management for the whole platform.

branchesPage.headerSubtitle: Operational registry of branches, load, telemedicine, rooms and bottlenecks across the clinic network.
branchesPage.showcaseTitle: Network branches as a separate management layer
branchesPage.showcaseDescriptionFiltered: Registry is filtered by selected clinic: branch load, telemedicine, inpatient and overload signals are visible.
branchesPage.showcaseDescriptionDefault: This view shows which branches carry throughput, where delays form, where telemedicine is higher, and how operational load is distributed across the network.
branchesPage.registrySubtitle: Network operations view by addresses, flow and signals

branchDetailPage.errorText: Could not load the branch. Check the identifier and API access.
branchDetailPage.notFoundText: No branch card with this identifier exists in registry.
branchDetailPage.appointmentsEmptyText: When branch schedule is filled, upcoming flow appears here.
branchDetailPage.opsTodayAppointmentsText: Current day schedule density with quick jump to branch-aware calendar.
branchDetailPage.opsShiftTeamText: Ratio of vets and admins supporting flow and service on this branch.
branchDetailPage.opsOverloadRiskText: Signal by bottleneck, blocked flow and resource pressure for fast response.
branchDetailPage.schedulerSubtitle: Working window, buffer and slot grid
branchDetailPage.resourcesSubtitle: Rooms, telemedicine and shared clinic resources
branchDetailPage.resourcesEmptyText: No resources are registered for this branch yet.
branchDetailPage.teamSignalsSubtitle: Vets and admins who support branch flow
branchDetailPage.quickCalendarText: Dense schedule, windows and team load in branch-aware flow view.
branchDetailPage.quickFlowboardText: Queue, delays and bottleneck signals for rapid intervention.
branchDetailPage.quickInpatientText: Current cases, discharge and inpatient load control for branch perimeter.
branchDetailPage.heroDescription: Load, resources, schedule and flow signals are shown first as a large block, then details and upcoming appointments.
branchDetailPage.schedulerEmptyText: Scheduler settings for this branch are not configured yet.
branchDetailPage.flowSignalWarningText: Branch shows signs of flow overload and waiting.
branchDetailPage.flowSignalOkText: Branch flow looks stable, no critical overload signals.

clinicDetailPage.headerSubtitle: Organization card with branches, team, templates, AI settings and clinic operational state.
clinicDetailPage.locationsSubtitle: Primary address and clinic working points
clinicDetailPage.perimeterStateSubtitle: Consents, inpatient and nearest operational load
clinicDetailPage.ownerConsentsSubtitle: Distribution of active access by record scopes.
clinicDetailPage.consentsEmptyText: When owners grant clinic access, scope distribution appears here.
clinicDetailPage.aiOverridesEmptyText: Clinic has no local AI overrides yet. Platform perimeter is active.
clinicDetailPage.reviewsSubtitle: Latest quality signals for clinic and vets

securityPage.headerSubtitle: Platform perimeter for access control, public links, AI policies, model usage and system audit.
securityPage.showcaseTitle: Single center for access policies, AI restrictions and system audit
securityPage.showcaseDescription: Platform rules are consolidated here: who can see what, how public links work, which models clinics can use, and how sensitive actions are logged. This screen is built for a clinic network, not a single demo installation.
securityPage.controlledItem1: • access to pet records by role and owner consent
securityPage.controlledItem2: • public link lifetime and token revocation
securityPage.controlledItem3: • AI usage rules by roles and scenarios
securityPage.visibleItem2: • provider and model usage across network
securityPage.visibleItem3: • denied access requests and policy violations
securityPage.nextLayerItem2: • retention windows and system audit exports
securityPage.securityControlSubtitle: Key elements of a mature system layer for clinic networks
securityPage.securityControlItem1: • centralized audit feed by clinics, roles and public views
securityPage.securityControlItem2: • unified policy center for documents, cameras, QR links and owner consents
securityPage.securityControlItem3: • AI constraints: available models, allowed scenarios and failover chains
securityPage.securityControlItem4: • limits and cost by clinic, role and provider for centralized network control

clinicsPage.headerSubtitle: Platform registry of organizations, brands and branches used by clinic switching, AI policies and templates.
clinicsPage.showcaseTitle: Clinics and branches ready for centralized management
clinicsPage.showcaseDescription: The registry now shows not only clinic covers, but also live network signals: branches, team composition, active inpatient, services and AI overrides.

settingsPage.headerSubtitle: Platform brand, feature flags, demo data and shared parameters across clinic network.
settingsPage.showcaseTitle: Unified settings perimeter for clinic network, branches and modules
settingsPage.showcaseDescription: This screen defines brand rules, module enablement and product behavior across all clinics in platform. It is intended for control center, not a single clinic.
settingsPage.llmCloudReservedSubtitle: Reserved slot for YandexGPT and other regional providers — wiring comes in a later release.
settingsPage.llmCloudReservedBody: Keys, folder IDs, routing and quotas will be managed here for the whole platform. No live connection yet; backend supports yandexgpt when you are ready.
settingsPage.llmCloudReservedLink: Open platform AI center for current routes and policies
settingsPage.baseBrandText: Logos, palette and base onboarding scenarios for clinic network.
settingsPage.featureFlagsText: Module enablement across platform, clinic and branch.

templatesPage.headerSubtitle: Platform template perimeter, doctor personal protocols and clinic-level usage analytics.
templatesPage.showcaseTitle: Templates that are actually used by clinics and doctors
templatesPage.showcaseDescription: The platform tracks which templates are published, which ones are most used, and where content diverges across branches and personal doctor sets.
templatesPage.scopeLevelsSubtitle: Where content lives and how it is distributed by layers
templatesPage.typesSubtitle: What dominates in knowledge base and protocols
templatesPage.clinicsAdoptionSubtitle: Where content really works and gets used
templatesPage.topTemplatesSubtitle: Most frequently used templates across network
templatesPage.recentUpdatesSubtitle: Who changed templates and where in platform perimeter
templatesPage.recommendedUpdatesSubtitle: Templates with high usage or outdated content
templatesPage.emptyNoContentText: After clinics publish templates, adoption analytics will appear here.
templatesPage.emptyNoActivityText: Template usage will appear after first visits and protocols.
templatesPage.emptyNoUpdatesText: History will appear after template edits and publications.
templatesPage.emptyNoRecommendationsText: When templates accumulate usage or become outdated, update prompts will appear here.

legalPage.title: Platform legal center
legalPage.subtitle: Platform perimeter requires confirmation of current privacy/terms/consent/DPA versions.
legalPage.cardUnconfirmedText: Control of mandatory documents before entering protected system perimeters.
legalPage.cardAuditText: Verification of access and confirmation events across the whole platform.
legalPage.cardPoliciesAiText: Synchronization of legal perimeter with AI policies and system constraints.
